title: Guo Zhanxin, Chairman of the Qinhuangdao Haigang District CPPCC and his delegation came to our company for a visit and exchange
contentHtml:
On the morning of August 20, Guo Zhanxin, Chairman of the CPPCC of Qinhuangdao Haigang District, and his delegation came to our company for a visit and exchange. Tianhui Group Chairman Zeng Shengwen, President Du Shuang, and Financial Director Jiang Sheng warmly received the guests.
During the meeting, Chairman Zeng Shengwen gave a detailed introduction to our company's current projects under construction and elaborated on the company's resumption of work and production after the epidemic. I also express my gratitude to the Haigang District CPPCC for its support to our company. Guo Zhanxin, Chairman of the Qinhuangdao Haigang District CPPCC, introduced the economic and social development of Qinhuangdao Haigang District, highly praised the companies that are members of the CPPCC, and encouraged the companies to become stronger and bigger. The two parties conducted in-depth exchanges and discussions on the development prospects of the domestic and international plastics industry.
The Haigang District Government Association continues to pay attention to the development of Tianhui Plastics Group. Achieve win-win results and jointly promote the development of social civilization.
titleZh: 秦皇岛市海港区政协主席郭占鑫一行来我公司访问交流
contentHtmlZh:
8月20日上午，秦皇岛市海港区政协主席郭占鑫一行来我公司访问交流。天晖集团董事长曾胜文、总裁杜霜、财务总监姜晟热情接待来宾。
会议期间，董事长曾胜文就我公司目前在建项目做了具体介绍，及详细阐述了疫情后企业复工复产情况。并对海港区政协对我公司的支持表示感谢。秦皇岛市海港区政协主席郭占鑫介绍了秦皇岛市海港区的经济与社会发展概况，并对政协委员企业表示高度赞扬，鼓励企业做强做大，双方就国内、国际塑化行业发展前景等方面进行了深度交流和探讨。
海港区政协会持续关注天晖塑料集团企业发展情况。实现共赢，共同促进社会文明的发展。
